nasb.text: When a wise man has a controversy with a foolish man, The foolish man either rages or laughs, and there is no rest.

esv.text: If a wise man has an argument with a fool, the fool only rages and laughs, and there is no quiet.

cnv.text: 智慧人與愚妄人爭訟， 愚妄人只會咆哮或嘲笑，總不能安靜。

ccb.text: 智者跟愚人对簿公堂， 愚人会怒骂嬉笑不止。

csbs.text: 智慧人与愚妄人争讼， 愚妄人又发怒又讥笑，没有安宁。
